name: divband
description: Monorepo for the divband multi-tenant website hosting platform.

scripts.dev:backend: API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 PUBLIC_SITE_DOMAIN=localhost.test PLATFORM_DOMAIN=divband.com UPLOAD_DOMAIN=uploads.localhost.test PERSISTENCE_DRIVER=memory SOURCE_CONTROL_PROVIDER=github GITLAB_URL=https://gitlab.com KUBERNETES_CONFIG_MODE=disabled OBJECT_STORAGE_BUCKET=divband-local OBJECT_STORAGE_REGION=us-east-1 DIVBAND_SIGNUP_MODE=public DIVBAND_REQUIRE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION=0 DIVBAND_SEED_DEMO_DATA=1 npm run dev --workspace @divband/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: GITHUB_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=Ov23liDHwzB5QdOp80MA GITHUB_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET=8f4e25e8c3cb6dc117bd9a6c83c44335e8e086df GITHUB_OAUTH_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/callback/github API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 PUBLIC_SITE_DOMAIN=localhost.test PLATFORM_DOMAIN=divband.com UPLOAD_DOMAIN=uploads.localhost.test PERSISTENCE_DRIVER=memory SOURCE_CONTROL_PROVIDER=github GITLAB_URL=https://gitlab.com KUBERNETES_CONFIG_MODE=disabled OBJECT_STORAGE_BUCKET=divband-local OBJECT_STORAGE_REGION=us-east-1 DIVBAND_SIGNUP_MODE=public DIVBAND_REQUIRE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION=0 DIVBAND_SEED_DEMO_DATA=1 npm run dev --workspace @divband/frontend
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:controls --workspace @divband/backend && npm run smoke:restore --workspace @divband/backend && npm run smoke:publish --workspace @divband/backend
